news.headline: NVIDIA partners with Google Cloud to combine NVIDIA NIM and Google Kubernetes Engine for scalable AI inference via Google Cloud Marketplace.
news.summary: NVIDIA has partnered with Google Cloud to combine NVIDIA NIM with Google Kubernetes Engine, enabling the provision of scalable AI inference solutions via Google Cloud Marketplace. This collaboration aims to cater to the growing demand for AI services, leveraging the strengths of both companies. Through this integration, users can access advanced AI capabilities seamlessly, enhancing their overall computing experiences.

news.headline: SynthBee, Inc. secures $20M seed funding for enterprise productivity innovation with a focus on security and precision. Founded by Rony Abovitz.
news.summary: Founded by entrepreneur Rony Abovitz, SynthBee is striving to revolutionize enterprise productivity through a secure, precise, and innovative approach. The company emphasizes safety, transparency, and scalability while safeguarding intellectual property and unique expertise. Abovitz, known for his successful ventures, leads the charge in this endeavor.

news.headline: Nokia is accelerating into a merger with Infinera, offering telecom solutions for all networks incl. 5G. Normalizing business faces challenges with spending slowdowns. More on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Nokia Oyj, a global provider of telecom equipment and network solutions, offers services for mobile, cloud, and optical networks. They are a pioneer in 5G deployment and will play a key role in 6G rollout by 2030. The company faces challenges due to macroeconomic pressures on telecom operators impacting spending. In the second quarter of 2024, Nokia's business is still normalizing, with tough year-over-year comparisons. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: EvoShield is partnering with UVA baseball for uniforms & apparel, creating 7 looks for 2025 season.
news.summary: EvoShield® has entered a significant partnership with the University of Virginia baseball program to provide NCAA Division I college baseball uniforms and apparel. Under this new agreement, the Cavaliers will showcase seven distinct uniform designs for the 2025 season. Coach Brian O’Connor collaborated with EvoShield designers to craft these new looks, including an innovative uniform combination that the team will debut in the upcoming season. This collaboration marks an exciting development for EvoShield in the collegiate baseball realm, highlighting their commitment to innovative sports apparel design.

news.headline: Manga artist Acky Bright hosts live drawing at New York Comic Con 2024 after "WcDonald's" campaign in 30+ countries.
news.summary: In October 16, 2024, McDonald's locations in North America and over 30 countries globally underwent a unique transition to "WcDonald's" as part of a February 2024 campaign. This initiative included manga-themed packaging and a digital manga series. The campaign garnered attention due to its innovative approach, reaching a wide audience across various countries.

news.headline: September retail sales report, key for economic growth, expected to show 0.3% uptick, with potential for 0.8% increase.
news.summary: This Thursday at 8:30 a.m. ET, the retail sales report for September will be released, providing insight into household spending in the final month of the third quarter. Analysts project a 0.3% month-over-month increase, compared to the 0.1% rise in August. Bank of America predicts an even stronger performance, with retail sales potentially rising by 0.8%. Economist Aditya Bhave anticipates gains of 0.7% to 0.8% for retail sales excluding autos and the core control group. The report is expected to reflect continued strong economic growth driven by consumer spending.

news.headline: Nu Skin focuses on innovation for growth, with launch of MYND360 for cognitive well-being. Hopes to offset economic challenges.
news.summary: Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. is focusing on growth strategies with key initiatives to enhance market presence and tap into high-growth sectors. They recently launched MYND360, a line of six clinically validated nutritional formulas aimed at cognitive well-being, catering to stress management, focus, memory enhancement, and better sleep. Despite macroeconomic challenges, Nu Skin is benefiting from product launches like Ageloc, Wellspa IO, and RenewspA IO. The company's focus on beauty devices and innovations in the brain health market have shown positive results. Their Rhyz business is a key driver of growth, contributing significantly to revenue. Nu Skin's strategic vision includes a focus on Products, Programs, and Platforms to maintain growth momentum.

news.headline: Nasdaq 100 futures holdings dip by $6B post ASML chip sell-off.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that approximately 25% of adults in the United States are facing financial difficulties due to the ongoing economic challenges. The research also highlighted that 35% of households have reported a decrease in income, with 18% experiencing job loss. Additionally, 42% of respondents expressed concerns about their ability to pay rent or mortgage in the coming months. The study emphasized the urgent need for government assistance and support programs to aid those struggling financially.

news.headline: Investors eye potential rally in Walgreens (WBA) stock at 33% of 52-week high. Similar case with Carvana saw over 10x increase in share price, hinting at double-digit upside. Stock could surge with a major announcement on the horizon.
news.summary: The article discusses the potential opportunity for investors in Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc. (NASDAQ: WBA) stock, which is currently trading at 33% of its 52-week high. The stock is seen as having the potential for a double-digit upside in the coming quarters. The article references the example of Carvana Co. (NYSE: CVNA), which faced similar challenges and saw a tenfold increase in its stock price after the company made the right moves. The article hints at a potential catalyst that could lead to a rally in Walgreens stock sooner than expected. The full story is available on Benzinga.com, where investors are betting on a surge in Walgreens stock ahead of an anticipated major announcement.

news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.6%, which is the lowest it has been in over 50 years. This decrease in unemployment has been attributed to strong job growth, with the economy adding 568,000 jobs in the past month alone. Additionally, the number of millionaires in the country has reached a record high of 11.4 million, with their combined wealth totaling $41 trillion. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of various government policies and recovery efforts following the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic.

She highlights the complexities of the sector at this time, emphasizing the difficulties that institutions are encountering. Khalili underscores that the industry is experiencing significant hurdles, indicating a challenging landscape.

Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB, SOL, XRP, DOGE, TON, ADA, AVAX, SHIB under scrutiny; BTC aims $70k, caution urged for selloff risks.

However, there are concerns that a sell-off at this price level could lead to a significant decline in both Bitcoin (BTC) and alternative cryptocurrencies (altcoins). news.headline: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) expected to report Q3 earnings decline; revenues pegged at $1.86B, EPS estimated at 30 cents, a 16.67% drop YoY. Higher expenses to affect results. NII expected to rise by 3% sequentially. Fed rate cuts might influence lending outlook.
news.summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ: HBAN) is expected to report its third-quarter 2024 financial results on Oct. 17. Analysts predict a decline in revenues and earnings compared to the previous year, with an estimated earnings per share of 30 cents, indicating a 16.67% decrease from the year-ago figure. The consensus estimate for revenues is $1.86 billion, reflecting a 1.67% year-over-year decline. Despite challenges like a fall in net interest income and higher expenses, Huntington Bancshares has a history of surpassing earnings expectations, with an average beat of 8.87% in the past four quarters. Factors influencing the third-quarter performance include the recent Federal Reserve interest rate cut and the lending outlook. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for net interest income is $1.35 billion, showing a 3% increase sequentially. Commercial and industrial, as well as consumer loan demand, remained strong in the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Wall Street favors debut swaps by Credit Suisse, significant impact on the financial market.

MeiraGTx's Parkinson's gene therapy AAV-GAD shows promising efficacy, with a 14.9% stock surge. Significant improvements seen in key endpoints, including an 18-point improvement in UPDRS Part 3 score. No adverse events reported. MeiraGTx shares have dropped 24.1% YTD.
news.summary: MeiraGTx Holdings' gene therapy candidate, AAV-GAD, for Parkinson's disease showed significant improvements in efficacy endpoints in a clinical bridging study. The study demonstrated an 18-point average improvement in the motor examination score for the high-dose group after 26 weeks, with no notable changes in the sham or low-dose groups. The treatment also led to dose-dependent improvements in the quality of life score for PD patients. The stock surged by 14.9% in response to the positive results. MeiraGTx reported that the gene therapy was safe and well-tolerated, with no serious adverse events related to treatment observed. Shares of MeiraGTx have dropped 24.1% year-to-date compared to a 1.8% industry decline. PD affects nearly one million people in the US.

news.headline: Lynx Software Technologies and Lockheed Martin collaborate to deliver cost-effective avionics systems, aiming to streamline time-to-market.
news.summary: A partnership has been established to provide efficient and top-quality A&D systems at a low cost, reducing time-to-market. Lynx Software Technologies (Lynx), based in San Jose, California, is known for its solutions for the Mission Critical Edge and is leading this initiative. The collaboration aims to enhance performance while cutting down on expenses. This development was announced on October 16, 2024.

Attochron's FSOC solution featured in CNN article, top 'broadband' Google search, addressing global digital divide.
news.summary: In Lexington, Virginia on October 16, 2024, Attochron LLC, a company specializing in carrier-grade free-space optical communications (FSOC) equipment, gained global attention when it was featured in a CNN article. The article became the top search result for the term 'broadband' on Google, reaching a vast audience. Attochron LLC's innovative technology and services received widespread recognition through this prominent media coverage.

news.headline: Restore Robotics subsidiary, Iconocare Health, aims for FDA 510(k) approval for reusing Da Vinci Xi® 8mm Monopolar Curved Scissors, offers cost savings and sustainability.

Restore Robotics' affiliate, Iconocare Health, presented a proposal related to this initiative. The program has resulted in significant cost savings for hospitals and has contributed to expanded sustainability measures.

news.headline: Hubitat Elevation updates to 2.3.9.192, adds Matter Bridges and Aqara device support in Scottsdale, AZ.
news.summary: Hubitat, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, revealed a notable advancement with the introduction of platform update 2.3.9.192 on Oct. 16, 2024. This update is a substantial improvement over the earlier version, 2.3.9, released previously in the year. The latest update includes enhanced support for Matter Bridges and Aqara devices, among other new features.

news.headline: Superior Plus Corp. (TSX: SPB) to release 2024 Q3 results on Nov 6th, host conference call on Nov 7th at 10:30 AM EST.
news.summary: In Toronto, Superior Plus Corp (TSX: SPB) is set to announce its 2024 third quarter results on November 6, 2024, post-market. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for November 7, 2024, at 10:30 AM EST to discuss the financial results. If interested in participating, register at the provided link. The webcast will be live and accessible for replay on Superior's website: https://www.superiorplu.

news.headline: Investors advised to buy Occidental Petroleum (OXY) and Microsoft (MSFT) but sell Dollar General (DG) due to inflation concerns.
news.summary: The article discusses the common practice of investors emulating successful Wall Street figures, who are usually net buyers in the market. It suggests looking beyond these popular investors to hedge funds, known for strategies that involve both long and short positions in the stock market. Two recommended stocks for bullish positions are Occidental Petroleum Co. (NYSE: OXY) and Microsoft Co. (NASDAQ: MSFT), due to the energy sector's new cycle and technology growth. However, Dollar General Co. (NYSE: DG) is advised to be avoided or shorted due to its struggling business model. This advice is reinforced by Stanley Druckenmiller's recent short on U.S. bonds, predicting prolonged inflation post-COVID-19 due to rising prices of everyday items.

news.headline: Larson unveils 2 innovative storm door products - Lifestyle 2.0 Midview Screen Away and Life-Core Composite Surface Single-Vent.
news.summary: In Maumee, Ohio, Larson, a prominent storm door manufacturer, has unveiled two groundbreaking products aimed at revolutionizing home security and convenience. The upcoming releases of the Lifestyle 2.0 Midview Screen Away and the upgraded Life-Core Composite Surface Single-Vent storm doors promise to provide exceptional performance, contemporary aesthetics, and effortless installation to customers. The Larson Lifestyle 2.0 Midview Screen Away introduces a fusion of modern protection and stylish design, catering to homeowners seeking advanced solutions for their households. This advancement signifies Larson's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction, with these products slated for availability in the upcoming fall season, showcasing Larson's dedication to enhancing home safety and aesthetics for residents.

news.headline: First Community Q3 earnings beat estimates with $0.50 per share, up from $0.23 last year. Revenues at $16.98 million.
news.summary: First Community (NASDAQ: FCCO) reported quarterly earnings of $0.50 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.45 and a significant increase from the $0.23 per share reported a year ago, adjusted for non-recurring items. This resulted in an 11.11% earnings surprise. In the previous quarter, the company outperformed expectations by 13.51%. Over the last four quarters, First Community has exceeded consensus EPS estimates three times. The company, part of the Zacks Banks - Southeast industry, generated revenues of $16.98 million in the quarter, surpassing estimates by 1.99% and marking a substantial increase from the $13.97 million reported a year ago. Management's commentary on the earnings call will significantly impact the stock's immediate price movement. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: CPSC approves federal standard for infant cushions to prevent deaths; 5-0 vote passes new safety regulations.
news.summary: In Washington on October 16, 2024, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has passed a federal mandatory standard aimed at enhancing the safety of infant support cushions. The standard is designed to safeguard babies from potential injuries and fatalities. The approval of this standard was achieved through a unanimous 5 to 0 vote by the Commission.

news.headline: Astec acquires Presagen's AI fertility tool, Life Whisperer, in Australia. The tool aims to enhance pregnancy outcomes.
news.summary: In Adelaide, Australia, on October 16, 2024, Astec, a leading global manufacturer of medical equipment for assisted reproduction, announced the acquisition of Presagen's fertility product Life Whisperer. This innovative tool offers non-invasive and swift assessment of embryos and eggs (oocytes) to enhance pregnancy success rates. The acquisition marks a significant development in the reproductive health industry.

news.headline: Las Vegas Review-Journal partners with Storyville RD for digital advertising with award-winning video and audio production.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 16, 2024, a significant collaboration was announced between the Las Vegas Review-Journal (RJ), the leading news outlet in Nevada, and Storyville RD, a renowned video production company established by experienced journalists. This partnership marks a unique and groundbreaking venture, seeking to enhance the news coverage and storytelling from both organizations.

news.headline: Credit Union Wealth Group in Chicago launches managed direct bond investments, expanding fixed income options for members.
news.summary: A financial institution in Chicago, Credit Union Wealth Group, has recently enhanced its fixed income investment offerings for its members with the introduction of Managed Direct Bond Investments. This move aims to provide members with more opportunities to invest in fixed income securities. This development underscores the continuous efforts of Credit Union Wealth Group to cater to the investment needs of its members.

news.headline: itel, the largest Caribbean BPO, introduces itelligence®, an AI platform for efficiency and empowerment.
news.summary: itel, the leading Caribbean-based BPO company, introduced their latest technological advancement on October 16, 2024, in Kingston, Jamaica. This innovation, named itelligence®, is a cutting-edge platform driven by artificial intelligence. It aims to empower agents and enhance operational efficiencies for scalability.itel is the biggest BPO company originating in the Caribbean, and their new platform is set to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Menopause documentary "The M Factor" airs on PBS, celebrating World Menopause Awareness Month, with over 100 screenings.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, a groundbreaking documentary titled "The M Factor: Shredding the Silence on Menopause" will debut on PBS starting October 17th. Viewers can catch the premiere by checking local listings or through pbs.org. This informative film aims to empower and educate women globally about menopause. It stands as the first documentary dedicated to this topic.

news.headline: CHN Energy showcases green innovations at World Media Summit in China, aiming to lead in sustainable energy transition.
news.summary: In Urumqi, China on October 16, 2024, Wang Min, a board director at CHN Energy, unveiled the company's ambitious plan to spearhead the shift towards clean and sustainable energy sources at the 6th World Media Summit held on October 14. The summit served as a platform for collaboration and discussions on global media-related issues.

news.headline: Monero cryptocurrency increases by 3.07% in 24 hours to $158.61, with 5.0% weekly gain from $151.61, all-time high at $542.33.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, the price of Monero (CRYPTO: XMR) has increased by 3.07% to $158.61, maintaining a positive trend from the previous week with a 5.0% gain. For more detailed information and a visual representation of the price movement, refer to the graph displayed alongside this data.

news.headline: New skincare line, Ella and Savage by Best Skincare, from Fusion CBD Products, offers THC and CBD-free products. Affordable luxury for better skin.
news.summary: In Miami on October 16, 2024, Fusion CBD Products introduced a new line with 0% THC and 0% CBD. Their new brand, Best Skincare, focuses on delivering budget-friendly, high-quality skincare solutions for consumers seeking luxury and efficiency. The company is committed to offering products that enhance both the appearance and well-being of individuals worldwide.

news.headline: Global AI market projected to grow at 39.7% CAGR, reaching $1.1 trillion by 2029 from $148.8 billion in 2023.
news.summary: A recent study by BCC Research predicts a significant compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 39.7% in the global artificial intelligence (AI) market. This growth is fueled by escalating investments in AI and the expansion of its applications. The market is projected to soar from $148.8 billion in 2023 to a substantial $1.1 trillion by 2029. The surge in market size is expected to be driven by factors such as increased adoption of AI technologies across various sectors worldwide. The study was released in Boston on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Mattel Films and Sony team up for a live-action View-Master film based on the iconic toy from 1939.
news.summary: The global toy company, Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT), known for its iconic brand portfolio, is collaborating with Sony Pictures Entertainment and Escape Artists to create a live-action movie based on the classic 3-D image toy, View-Master. Since its launch in 1939, View-Master has been a beloved source of entertainment for both kids and adults. Mattel's partnership for the film marks a significant step in leveraging the nostalgia and appeal of the timeless toy, which continues to be a favorite across generations.

news.headline: Beeline reports high client retention & fast solution implementation speed, showcasing its prowess in managing global workforce.

These successes highlight the company's prowess in retaining a high number of clients while rapidly implementing solutions for their workforce needs.

news.headline: ASU China EMBA program ranked 7th globally by Financial Times, up from previous position. Joint program with Shanghai National Accounting Institute.
news.summary: TEMPE, Arizona - The ASU W. P. Carey School of Business China Executive MBA program, in partnership with the Shanghai National Accounting Institute, has surged into the top tier of global rankings. In the latest Financial Times rankings for Executive MBA programs in 2024, the joint program made an impressive leap to secure the 7th position worldwide. This accomplishment highlights the program's excellence and solidifies its standing among the best EMBA programs globally.

news.headline: hireEZ recognized as an Accelerator in talent acquisition tech by Nucleus Research in 2024 report. Standout sourcing, analytics, and CRM features.
news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California, has emerged as a leading provider of talent acquisition technology due to its advanced capabilities in sourcing, customer relationship management (CRM), analytics, and automation. hireEZ, the innovative platform, is renowned for its robust features and is recognized for its status as an accelerator in the industry. The news was announced on October 16, 2024, without specifying the source.
